title: Ordinary Crook
description: Adds ExNihiloAdscensio's crook. Croop is a dedicated tool for destroying leaves.
body:
This mod adds only Crook in ExNihiloAdscensio.

There is already Crooked Crooks, but I wanted to use it with Fabric 1.18.2 instead of Quilt, so I made it.

It's a mod under development, but I don't think it will be updated much.

 

Croop is a dedicated tool for destroying leaves.

Add Wooden Crook and Bone Crook.
Leaves can be broken with Crooks more efficiently and have a slightly higher drop rate.
Wooden Crook is x2, Bone Crook increases the drop rate of x5 leaf drop items.
You can pull mobs by right-clicking on them in Crook.

 

Recipes

Wooden Crook

 

Bone Crook

Blaze Rod Crook

 

Withered Crook
